summary: Imports MIDI Clock transport into clock.state.
description: MIDI Clock converts tick, start, stop, continue, and Song Position Pointer messages into graph-visible clock.state. It exposes timing authority explicitly and never drives audio callbacks directly.
runtimeBehavior: Runs as an external clock adapter. Runtime code snapshots incoming MIDI messages outside realtime audio callbacks and hands clock.state into the graph.

ports.description: Outputs value<clock.state> with MIDI Clock capability and authority metadata.
Outputs event<event.bang> for each MIDI Timing Clock tick.
Outputs boolean transport state from MIDI Start, Stop, and Continue.

params.description: Optional meter numerator used to derive bar and beat from Song Position Pointer.
Optional meter denominator used to derive bar and beat from Song Position Pointer.

example.title: Display MIDI Clock authority
example.description: Connect state to clock.position-display to inspect which MIDI timing fields are authoritative, derived, or unavailable.
